server.name: 1Stay Hotels
server.description: Real-time hotel search and booking via MCP. The first MCP server that completes real hotel reservations inside AI conversations.

tools.name: search_hotels
tools.description: Search for available hotels by location, dates, and number of guests. Returns a list of properties with nightly rates, star ratings, and distance from search center. Supports optional filters for price range, star rating, and amenities. For best results with neighborhood-specific searches, use latitude/longitude coordinates with a tight radius rather than location strings.

location.description: City name or address to search near (e.g., 'Charlotte, NC' or 'Las Vegas Strip')

radius.description: Search radius in miles from coordinates (default: 10)

tools.name: get_hotel_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific hotel including room types, live rates, amenities, cancellation policies, and property images. Requires a hotel_id from search results. Rate quotes are valid for approximately 15 minutes.

tools.name: book_hotel
tools.description: Create a hotel reservation and receive a secure checkout URL to complete payment. Payment and credit card information are handled on the secure checkout page — never in the AI conversation. The checkout session is valid for approximately 30 minutes.

hotel_id.description: Hotel identifier from search or details results

rate_code.description: Rate code from hotel details results

guest_name.description: Full name of the primary guest

sms_opt_in.description: Opt in to receive post-booking SMS updates (default: false)

tools.name: get_booking
tools.description: Look up an existing reservation by booking ID (stk_bk_xxxx format) or hotel confirmation number. Returns reservation details including hotel name, dates, rate, and current status.

booking_id.description: Stayker booking ID (stk_bk_xxxx) or hotel confirmation number

tools.name: cancel_booking
tools.description: Cancel an existing hotel reservation. Returns cancellation confirmation and any applicable cancellation policy details. This action cannot be undone.

booking_id.description: Stayker booking ID (stk_bk_xxxx) or hotel confirmation number

tools.name: retrieve_booking
tools.description: Find a reservation and resend the confirmation email to the guest's email address on file.

booking_id.description: Stayker booking ID (stk_bk_xxxx) or hotel confirmation number
